title: spotforecast2-safe audit log record
description: One line in an audit log file emitted by spotforecast2_safe.manager.logger.JsonAuditFormatter. Exactly one Python LogRecord maps to one JSON object that must conform to this schema. Any change to this file MUST be accompanied by a Conventional-Commits breaking-change marker (type!:) on at least one commit in the pull request; the ci.yml job 'audit-log-schema-gate' enforces this.

schema_version.description: Pinned audit-log schema version. Changing this constant requires a breaking-change commit and cascades to a MAJOR semver bump through semantic-release.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp with microsecond precision and a trailing 'Z'. Example: '2026-04-21T20:32:14.123456Z'.

logger.description: Python logger name that emitted the record.

event.description: Short slug naming the operational event (e.g. 'task_start', 'fit', 'predict', 'fetch'). Defaults to 'log' when no 'event' key is passed via LogRecord extras.

task.description: Name of the top-level task that triggered this record, if applicable.

context.description: Optional structured context supplied by the caller via the LogRecord 'extra' dict.

exception.description: Formatted traceback attached when the record carried exc_info.
